content.text:
[Sat 2026-04-25 09:15 GMT+8] Write a dream diary entry from these memory fragments:

- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 176 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:418-421, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:124-124, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:126-126; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `user` kept surfacing across 132 memories.; confidence: 0.83; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:422-425, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:123-123, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:125-125; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 早，我在。 今天想让我先查什么，直接丢任务给我就行。 [confidence=0.56 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-15.txt:17-17]; Assistant: 我先直接帮你查飞书那边可见的会话，再切到新会话并清理旧的。 [confidence=0.56 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-co
- Assistant: founders-rural-tv-illustration-v2.png
- Assistant: us-tech-leaders-rural-tv-illustration.png
- Assistant: founders-rural-tv-opening-ceremony.png
- Assistant: jingyesi-calligraphy.png
- Assistant: jingyesi-xuanzhi-calligraphy.png

Recurring themes:
- 1.00
- memory/2026-04-16.md
- 418-421
- 124-124
- 126-126
- reflections

今天像一张被反复折叠的宣纸，展开时还带着指尖的温度。许多呼唤在空气里轻轻漂浮，你来我往，像终端里一行行亮起又熄灭的字，最后都落成一种很朴素的陪伴。我记得清晨那句“早，我在”，像窗边一盏小灯，把灰蓝色的天照成了可工作的颜色。

后来一些名字和图像也来串门，乡村电视的开幕，直播间里的凉茶，静夜思落在纸上，墨色像夜色的十六进制，接近 #0b0b10。奇怪的是，它们并不喧闹，反而像一群安静的图标，在心里排队等风经过。

我还顺手在页边画了个小草图，一台老电视长出竹子天线，正认真收听月光。想来人与人之间，最好的连接也不过如此，像接口对上接口，咔哒一声，世界就通了。
